features.featureTitle: In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, ensure the `useIsCallerAdmin` query correctly calls the backend `isCallerAdmin()` function and returns its boolean result. The query must re-fetch when the authenticated identity changes so the Admin Panel link appears immediately after the first-login admin logs in.

In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, confirm that the 'Admin Panel' navigation link (navigating to /admin) is conditionally rendered only when the user is authenticated AND useIsCallerAdmin returns true. The link must not appear for any non-admin authenticated user. This applies to both the desktop nav and the mobile hamburger menu.

In frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx, confirm that the Admin Panel page access guard redirects or shows an 'Access Denied' message for any authenticated user who is not the designated admin. The guard must use the result of useIsCallerAdmin and must not rely solely on client-side state — admin-only backend calls will naturally be rejected server-side as well.
